response.step_by_step_log: The video was analyzed, identifying four distinct songs based on the on-screen text appearing in the top-left corner at the start of each segment: 'RIDE ON TIME', 'REFLECT', 'Tokyo Wabi-Sabi Lullaby', and 'SHINKIRO'. Artist metadata was confirmed through web search and general knowledge. The artist names were simplified: 'Tatsuro Yamashita' for 'RIDE ON TIME', 'Gawr Gura' for 'REFLECT', 'HoneyWorks' for 'Tokyo Wabi-Sabi Lullaby', and 'GuraMarine' for 'SHINKIRO'. Lyric searches for each song were conducted using the simplified song title and artist names in Japanese and English, yielding accurate results for all four tracks. The video was then segmented by these songs and instrumental transitions.
response.global_summary: A 4-song musical medley performance by virtual YouTuber Gawr Gura. The performance features four distinct songs, with instrumental transitions between each, including a costume change into a kimono.

scenes.description: Gawr Gura performs 'RIDE ON TIME' with text 'RIDE ON TIME' appearing in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
青い水平線を今駆け抜けてく
研ぎ澄まされた時の流れ感じて
Oh, ときめきへと動き出す世界は
忘れかけてた遠い夢の訪れ
Ride on time
さあ思いなら、優しく受け止めて
そっと包んで
Ride on time
心に火をつけて
飛び立つ魂に送るよ
Ride on time
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Running through the blue horizon now
Feeling the flow of sharpened time
Oh, the world starts moving towards excitement
It's the arrival of a distant dream I had forgotten
Ride on time
If you have feelings, gently accept them
Wrap them up softly
Ride on time
Light a fire in your heart
Send it to your soaring soul
Ride on time

scenes.description: Instrumental transition with lights and Gura dancing.
Gawr Gura performs 'REFLECT' with text 'REFLECT' in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
One word brings another
水面に映る自分が言った
"あぁ、私は悪いサメです"
ずっと恐れていた
赤く光るその目
海の底へ
あぁ、とても綺麗だ
一人で見上げた夜空に花火
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
One word brings another
My reflection in the water says to me
"Oh my god, you're such a bad shark"
Her terrifying gaze, her glowing red eyes
Begin to sink into the void at the bottom of the sea
Why, oh why? (Your tired eyes)
Do you cry? (Begin to fall)
I got you everything you craved
Tell me if a (Your darkest thoughts)
Do you know what it means to be alive?

scenes.description: Transition where Gura changes into a kimono.
Gawr Gura performs 'Tokyo Wabi-Sabi Lullaby' with text 'Tokyo Wabi-Sabi Lullaby' in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
Tok Tok Tok
Tokyo Wabi-Sabi Lullaby
眠れない夜には Hold me tight
Oh na na na na na na na
ねぇ今年の夏 また会えるかな
La-la, la-la, la-la
一人で見上げた夜空に花火
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Tok-tok-tok
Tokyo Wabi-Sabi Lullaby
On nights when I can't sleep, hold me tight
Oh na-na-na-na-na-na-na
Hey, can we meet again this summer?
La-la, la-la, la-la
Fireworks in the night sky
I looked up at alone

scenes.description: Gawr Gura performs 'SHINKIRO' with text 'SHINKIRO' in the top-left corner.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
波打ち際 ほどけた髪
帽子の先 見覚えある
青いワーゲン Stop the Flashback
南風の (In Southern Winds)
いたずらな魔法ね (It's Magic Rays)
遠い夏の あの眩暈に 戻さないで
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The shoreline waves
Untied hair, the tip of a hat
I recognize it, a blue Volkswagen
Stop the flashback
Southern winds (In Southern Winds)
A playful magic spell (It's Magic Rays)
Don't send me back to the dizzy days of that summer
